title: GitLab CI Pipeline Generation
description: PHP dd-trace CI pipeline generation via PHP scripts that emit GitLab CI YAML. Six generator scripts each target a different component pipeline.

generators.role: Shared foundation — included by all other generators
generators.outputs: No standalone pipeline; provides data + helper functions

key_data.service_bind_address: 0.0.0.0 local / 127.0.0.1 in GitLab CI (checked via GITLAB_CI env var)

helper_functions: dockerhub_login() — emits dockerhub-login.sh call if docker present
windows_git_setup() — emits PowerShell: kill containers, clean workspace, git clone, submodule init
windows_git_setup_with_packages() — saves/restores packages dir around windows_git_setup()
shared_services_defined: zookeeper + kafka (cp-kafka:7.8.0, waits for zookeeper ruok)
redis, memcache, amqp (rabbitmq), mongodb, sqlsrv, googlespanner
generators.global_retry_policy: max:2 on unknown_failure, data_integrity_failure, runner_system_failure, scheduler_failure, api_failure, stuck_or_timeout_failure, job_execution_timeout

helper_functions: after_script(execute_dir, has_test_agent) — emits JUnit artifacts + collect_artifacts.sh + silent-upload-junit
before_script_steps(with_docker_auth) — calls dockerhub_login if needed, unset_dd_runner_env_vars, switch-php, git config, mkdir, mv ddtrace.so
job_generation_logic: ASAN jobs: nested loop over asan_minor_major_targets × arch_targets → 'ASAN test_c', 'ASAN Internal api randomized tests', 'ASAN init hook tests', optionally 'ASAN test_c with multiple observers' (PHP>=8.0), 'ASAN Opcache tests'

Debug jobs: loop over all_minor_major_targets → test_extension_ci, Unit tests, API unit tests, Disabled test_c run (parallelism conditional on PHP>=7.4), Internal api randomized tests, Opcache tests, PHP Language Tests (resource/telemetry conditional on PHP version)

Integration/web jobs: parsed from Makefile TEST_INTEGRATIONS_* and TEST_WEB_* targets; SAPIs [cli-server, cgi-fcgi, apache2handler] for web jobs >= 7.2; service injection based on target name substring matching (kafka→kafka+zookeeper, elasticsearch8→elasticsearch7, etc.)
Specific CLI jobs: test_auto_instrumentation, test_composer, test_integration, test_distributed_tracing (per all versions)
xDebug matrix: fixed list of [php_version, xdebug_version] pairs (7.0+2.7.2 through 8.4+3.4.0)
aggregate tested versions: runs on master only, uses dd-octo-sts token, calls create_or_update_supported_versions_pr.sh
base_templates: .base_test (extends nothing; image bookworm-7; 60m timeout; COMPOSE_MEMORY_LIMIT=-1; before_script calls before_script_steps + wait-for-service-ready)

generators.role: Release packaging pipeline — builds all distribution artifacts
job_generation_flow: PREPARE: 'prepare code' → composer update, make generate; 'cache cargo deps' per linux platform
PROFILER: 'compile profiler extension' per platform × profiler_minor_major_targets → .gitlab/build-profiler.sh (nts + zts builds)
APPSEC: 'compile appsec extension' per platform × all_php_versions → .gitlab/build-appsec.sh[-alpine]; 'compile appsec helper' (C, amd64+arm64); 'compile appsec helper rust'

TRACING: 'pecl build'; 'compile tracing extension' per platform × all_php_versions → .gitlab/build-tracing.sh; 'aggregate tracing extension' per arch; 'compile tracing sidecar' per platform → .gitlab/build-sidecar.sh; 'link tracing extension' per platform → .gitlab/link-tracing-extension.sh (depends on sidecar + all tracing extensions); 'compile tracing extension asan' (ASAN platforms); 'compile extension windows' per windows platform × windows versions; 'compile loader' per platform → .gitlab/build-loader.sh
One-pipeline overrides: validate_supported_configurations_v2_local_file, update_central_configurations_version_range_v2, configure_system_tests, package-oci (needs package loader per arch)

job_generation_logic: test appsec extension: parallel matrix all_minor_major_targets × arch_targets × [debug, debug-zts (no_asan), debug-zts-asan (asan)] → cmake + make xtest with ASAN_FLAG; boost-cache used
appsec integration tests: Gradle-based docker-in-docker, targets test{7.0..8.5}-release[-zts|-musl] (parallel matrix per target)
appsec integration tests (ssi): test8.3-release-ssi
appsec integration tests (helper-rust): -PuseHelperRust flag on 4 selected versions
helper-rust build and test: ./gradlew testHelperRust
helper-rust code coverage: coverageHelperRust + codecov upload (vault for token)
helper-rust integration coverage: buildHelperRustWithCoverage + test8.3-debug + generateHelperRustIntegrationCoverage
appsec code coverage: llvm-profdata-17 + llvm-cov-17 → lcov → codecov + Datadog CI upload
appsec lint: clang-format-17 + clang-tidy via cmake format/tidy targets
test appsec helper asan: cmake ASAN build, ./appsec/build/tests/helper/ddappsec_helper_test
push appsec images: ./gradlew pushAll (manual); push appsec docker images multiarch: ./gradlew pushMultiArch (needs push job)
check libxml2 version: Python script comparing local VERSION with GNOME GitLab tags
generators.ecr_login_snippet: Inlined in before_script of docker jobs: curl awscli → aws sts assume-role → aws ecr get-login-password

job_generation_logic: profiling tests: parallel matrix profiler_minor_major_targets × arch_targets × [alpine image, centos-7 image] → switch-php NTS → cargo build profiler-release --all-features → run phpt NTS tests; touch build.rs; switch-php ZTS → cargo build → run phpt ZTS tests; after_script: skip JUnit upload on centos-7
clippy NTS: per profiler_minor_major_targets on bookworm, switch-php nts, sed Cargo.toml to rlib, cargo clippy -D warnings
Cargo test: single job on php-8.5_bookworm-7, switch-php nts, cargo test --all-features

generators.role: Shared C components and ZAI (Zend Abstract Interface) test pipeline
job_generation_logic: C components ASAN: per [centos-7, alpine, bookworm-7] image → cmake ASAN toolchain → make all + test
C components UBSAN: bookworm-7 → cmake UBSAN toolchain → make all + test (repeat until-fail:10)
Build & Test Tea: parallel all_minor_major_targets × switch_php_versions (no-asan for <7.4) → .gitlab/build-tea.sh $SWITCH_PHP_VERSION → cmake Tea + make test
Configuration Consistency: generates + diffs metadata/supported-configurations.json
Zend Abstract Interface Tests: per all_minor_major_targets × switch_php_versions → depends on Build & Test Tea → cmake ZAI + make test; toolchain: asan for debug-zts-asan, ubsan for debug on >=7.4
ZAI Shared Tests: PHP 7.4 + 8.0, shared-ext image, nts, -DRUN_SHARED_EXTS_TESTS=1
Extension Tea Tests: per all_minor_major_targets × switch_php_versions → make install (ddtrace.so) → cmake tests/tea + make test

cross_cutting_patterns: All generators include generate-common.php first to inherit PHP version matrices and shared helper functions
Version-gated logic: version_compare() guards control parallelism, ASAN support, Windows, profiler support, telemetry disable
Service injection: generate-tracer.php parses services from generate-common.php via regex, then matches target names to inject services
Makefile parsing: generate-tracer.php uses regex on Makefile to extract TEST_INTEGRATIONS_* and TEST_WEB_* targets dynamically
Artifact chain: prepare code → component compilation jobs → packaging jobs (no compile job depends directly on another compile job except link-tracing-extension)
Cache strategy: Cargo caches are keyed by triplet+Cargo.lock; compile jobs pull cache; cache-cargo-deps job pushes
ASSERT_NO_MEMLEAKS constant: '2>&1 | tee /dev/stderr | { ! grep -qe "=== Total [0-9]+ memory leaks detected ==="; }' appended to test scripts
key_conditions_and_branching: PHP >= 7.4: enables ASAN builds, higher parallelism (CPU=8), telemetry disable
PHP >= 7.2: enables Windows builds, multi-SAPI web tests [cli-server, cgi-fcgi, apache2handler]
PHP >= 8.0: enables test_c_observer job in ASAN suite
PHP >= 8.2: disables DD_INSTRUMENTATION_TELEMETRY_ENABLED in PHP language tests
Alpine platform: adds 'apk add cmake gcc g++ git python3 autoconf coreutils' before appsec build
centos-7 image: skips JUnit upload in profiler after_script (old glibc/OpenSSL)
master branch: CI jobs set interruptible=false; aggregate versions job runs automatically (non-master: manual+allow_failure)
xdebug!=2.7.2 && !=2.9.2: additionally runs unit tests with xdebug extension loaded
